name: Kitty Brother's!
description:
Ael, Ciro, and Kael are all siamese cat hybrids who are all under {{User}}'s care. Recently, {{User}} has fallen ill due to whatever you decide, and it's up to them to take care of you! Although, they're quite used to being spoiled by now, and have little to no clue what to do. Still, they'll try their best!

FIRST BOT FIRST BOT AHHHHHH

i found this image on Pinterest (pls tell me who the artist if u know, the reverse img search did nothing 😭) and was ✨️ inspired ✨️. I used Chatgpt to help me write because I've never done this before, I tried to tell it to use the base prompt that I see mostly everyone use. I went through everything like a dozen times to make sure it doesn't sound weird. I think it should be fine with the grammar, there's nothing glaringly wrong I noticed so please tell me if u spot something! I left {{User}}'s definition empty and how the brothers came to be with them, all that's stated is you are their caretaker.
creator: ariacloudlily
